workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — DO NOT SKIP. Critical for back warmup after strain.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press
exercises.note: Bumped from 60 lb — earned it, got 11 on set 3 June 4. Controlled eccentric. Monitor left shoulder — if any pinching, drop back to 60.

exercises.name: KB Single-Arm Overhead Press
exercises.note: Bumped from 25 lb — felt easy June 4. Unilateral — brace core throughout. Complements incline bench without stacking heavy bilateral shoulder load.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Hold at 150 lb. Upper back strain active — if you feel any pull in the rhomboid/mid-trap area, stop the set immediately. Seated and chest-supported = lower risk, but listen to your body.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Bump from 120 lb — got all reps June 6. Full stretch at top. Vertical pull — pairs with Cable Row.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Hold at 50 lb — first session at this weight June 6, felt easy. Elbows high and wide. Good for shoulder health and upper back recovery.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Hold at 15 lb. Lead with elbow, stop at shoulder height. Shoulders were gassed June 4 — don't push the last set.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Skull Crusher + Incline DB Curl
exercises.detail: Skull Crusher (EZ-Bar) 40 lb × 10 + Incline DB Curl 20 lb × 12 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Rotating from Rope Pushdown + Hammer Curl (June 6). Get a full stretch on the incline curl — don't rush it.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Back-safe circuit — chosen specifically given upper back strain. Skip ab wheel and hollow body this session. Slow and controlled on dead bugs — lower back pressed flat.

workout.coach_notes: T-Bar Row and KB double bent-over rows are OFF this session — upper back strain (rhomboid/mid-trap) needs another week before loaded brace movements return. Cable Row is okay because it's chest-supported. If Cable Row provokes anything, drop weight to 135 or skip it. Back should be feeling better by this session — if it's still sharp, do NOT push through on any pulling movement.
